untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of 'pullback patterns', 'swing highs/lows', 'retracement levels', 'multi-timeframe confluence', and 'impulse waves' — none of which can be reliably expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. These require pattern recognition logic beyond simple threshold-based conditions. Thresholds for retracement % and ATR multipliers were not numerically specified in source material.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using pivot points as support/resistance proxy and volume confirmation. However, the core signal logic (avoiding mid-pullback entries and entering only on first impulse after support bounce) requires explicit swing point detection and pattern state tracking, which exceeds the capability of point-in-time indicator comparisons. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal specification.
